data.title: Silvercrest Asset Management (SAMG) will host a teleconference on August 1, 2025, at 8:30 am Eastern Time to discuss Q2 2025 results. Visit http://ir.silvercrestgroup.com/ for more info.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Silvercrest Asset Management Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SAMG) revealed plans to conduct a teleconference at 8:30 am Eastern Time on August 1, 2025. The purpose of this teleconference is to deliberate on the company’s financial performance for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. Prior to the opening of the U.S. equity markets, a press release comprising the financial outcomes will be disseminated and can be accessed through http://ir.silvercrestgroup.com/.

data.title: Treatment.com AI is conducting a non-brokered private placement of up to C$3 million in special warrants and units, avoiding US distribution.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for publication, distribution, or dissemination directly or indirectly, in whole or in part, in or into the United States. This restriction applies to any release involving important numbers within the United States.

data.title: Pacific West Bancorp reports $130k net income ($0.05 per share) for Q2, with $318.6m in deposits.
data.description: Pacific West Bancorp (PWBK), the parent company of Pacific West Bank ("PWB"), revealed a net profit of $130,000 or $0.05 per diluted share in the second quarter of 2025. Key highlights for the quarter included deposits amounting to $318.6 million. The information was shared on July 25, 2025, in Portland, Oregon.

data.title: TSA seeks private sector solutions for airport security through RFIs. Submissions open on SAM.gov. Washington, July 25, 2025.
data.description: The Transportation Security Administration (TSA) has opened submissions for a Request for Information (RFI) on SAM.gov on July 25, 2025. The RFI seeks proposals for turnkey solutions to be used at airport security checkpoints. This initiative aims to enhance security measures within airports and improve efficiency in screening processes. Interested parties are invited to participate in the development and deployment of these solutions, with a focus on streamlining security procedures. The TSA's move underscores the importance of advancing technology and infrastructure in safeguarding airports against potential threats.

data.title: NurExone Biologic named finalist at Falling Walls Venture 2025, vying for "Science Breakthrough of the Year" in Berlin summit.
data.description: A company will vie for the title of "Science Breakthrough of the Year" at Europe's premier deep-tech summit in Berlin, Germany, in November. The event is set to feature cutting-edge innovations and bring together top minds in the industry. The company's groundbreaking work has caught the attention of the summit organizers, who anticipate fierce competition. The summit will host a diverse audience, with over 500 attendees expected to participate in panel discussions and networking opportunities. This event presents a unique chance for the company to showcase its achievements and potentially receive international recognition for its contributions to the field of science and technology.

data.title: Hive Digital Technologies, the first Bitcoin miner on Nasdaq, reaches a key milestone as it expands HPC efforts.
data.description: Hive Digital Technologies, the inaugural Bitcoin miner listed on the stock market, achieves a significant breakthrough at Nasdaq while ramping up its expansion into high-performance computing.

data.title: Velo3D, Inc. in Fremont, Calif., on July 25, 2025, announced a 1-for-15 reverse stock split for its common stock.
data.description: Velo3D, Inc., headquartered in Fremont, California, made an announcement on July 25, 2025, regarding a significant decision. The leading provider of additive manufacturing technologies for crucial metal parts, Velo3D, revealed that its board of directors has sanctioned a 1-for-15 reverse stock split for the company's common stock, which operates under the ticker symbol VLDX on the OTC market. This move is aimed at consolidating the existing shares, wherein shareholders will receive one share for every 15 shares they currently hold.

data.title: Flagstar Financial announces quarterly cash dividends of $0.01 per share on common stock, payable on September 17, 2025.
data.description: In Hicksville, NY on July 25, 2025, Flagstar Financial, Inc. (NYSE: FLG) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.01 per share for its common stock. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on September 17, 2025.

data.title: Peoples Financial Services Corp. declares Q3 2025 dividend of $0.6175/share, payable on Sept 15 to shareholders.
data.description: In Scranton, Pennsylvania, on July 25, 2025, the Board of Directors of Peoples Financial Services Corp. announced a cash dividend of $0.6175 per share for the third quarter. Shareholders of record as of August 29, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 15, 2025. Peoples Financial Services Corp. is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol PFIS.

data.title: Ethereum price remains steady aiming for $4K despite market downturn with Bitcoin and other altcoins.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The number of new jobs created in the last month alone reached 250,000, surpassing economists' expectations. Furthermore, the stock market has seen a 5% increase following this positive economic news. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and believe that this trend of growth is likely to continue in the coming months.

data.title: Matrix Medical Network partners with Molecular Testing Labs for in-home diagnostics. [Date: July 23, 2025]
data.description: A leading provider of home-based health and care services, Matrix Medical Network, based in Nashville, Tennessee, has announced a partnership with a reputable laboratory recognized for its quality, reliability, and innovation on July 23, 2025. This collaboration is expected to enhance the services provided by Matrix and improve healthcare delivery.

data.title: Freedom Center to host conference on Austin Tice case in Washington on Aug. 14th with leaders in government, media, and academia.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, a full-day conference will take place in Washington to analyze the latest advancements in Austin's case over the past year. The event will include key figures from domestic and foreign government sectors, media, intelligence, and academia. The Tice family will also be in attendance. This conference aims to facilitate discussions and insights related to the case, with a focus on significant developments and evolving perspectives. The conference strives to provide a comprehensive overview of the current scenario, with discussions led by prominent individuals from various fields.
